name: Estelle
title: Excellent!
text: Wow, this tastes incredibly real and delicious! I've tried every electrolyte on the market, but I never realized how many chemicals I was consuming.

name: Kristen
title: Excellent!
text: I can drink this all day long. It tastes so refreshing!

name: Kajsa
title: Excellent!
text: We love Purest Electrolyte and drink it all the time! It keeps us hydrated and energized. Clean ingredients, great taste — highly recommend!

name: Nick
title: Excellent!
text: As a runner of many years, I thought I had my hydration figured out, trying every electrolyte product on the market. But it wasn't until I added Purest Electrolyte to my daily regimen that I realized how dehydrated I had been. Now I use it several times a day, and the difference is remarkable.

name: Max
title: Changed my performance!
text: I'm an athlete that's super picky about ingredients and I've tried every electrolyte. Truly this is by far the best one I've ever had. The full spectrum of minerals makes such a difference.
